title: Where to watch puchi eva
wikitext:
[]: Where to watch puchi eva?             Quote Post by TIRAICHBADFTHR » Mon Feb 03, 2020 5:54 pm I know I know, ok? But I just finished the OG series and I want something cute to cool off to. I can only find the occasional clip on vimeo or dailymotion, is there anywhere the whole series is available?

[]: Re: Where to watch puchi eva?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Feb 03, 2020 6:59 pm PM Sent

[]: Re: Where to watch puchi eva?             Quote Post by Blockio » Mon Feb 03, 2020 8:55 pm For anyone else looking to watch it - It's hard to come by, but sailing the high seas it can be found, if you catch my drift. I wouldn't exactly consider it to be worth it tho, it's just a collection of 2-3 minute shorts with varying degree of entertainment value EDIT: To clarify, there are some two or three episodes that are genuinely funny, the rest is honestly a waste of time (although not a waste of much time, total length is just over an hour probably)

[]: Re: Where to watch puchi eva?             Quote Post by TIRAICHBADFTHR » Mon Feb 03, 2020 9:03 pm Blockio wrote: For anyone else looking to watch it - It's hard to come by, but sailing the high seas it can be found, if you catch my drift.
